understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile '+' at the end of each level while avoiding spike tiles that cause death.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After a move, the player falls due to gravity until landing on a solid tile. In this episode, gravity was DOWN, so falling is toward higher y (downward). CLICK removes breakable blocks at a target position, which can open paths for falling. UNDO reverts the previous action. Spikes kill on contact. Reaching the goal gem wins the level.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile '+' at the end of each level while avoiding spike tiles that cause death.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal only (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT). After a move, the player falls due to gravity until landing on a solid tile. In this episode, gravity was DOWN, so falling is toward higher y (downward). CLICK removes breakable blocks at a target position, which can open paths for falling. UNDO reverts the previous action. Spikes kill on contact. Reaching the goal gem wins the level.
